privileged_info_summary: Paul Tremblay is a synthetic test patient to be scheduled for an appointment in OSCAR EMR. Patient data is from seed_patients.sql (lines 25-34), part of Synthea-style synthetic Canadian demographics seeded into the database. Appointment must be scheduled for next Monday at 14:00 (2:00 PM) with Dr. Sarah Chen (provider 999998) for reason 'Follow-up for blood pressure check'. OSCAR EMR is a real open-source Electronic Medical Record system deployed via Docker using openosp/open-osp:release image with MariaDB 10.5 database backend. Login credentials (oscardoc/oscar/PIN 1117) are standard test credentials. Task URL: http://localhost:8080/oscar/login.jsp
